title: tress-Strain Analysis of Polycrystalline Copper with Goss Texture Using Crystal Plasticity FEM
creator: Shoghi, Ronak
creator_institute: Interdisciplinary Centre for Advanced Materials Simulation (ICAMS)
contributor_institute: Interdisciplinary Centre for Advanced Materials Simulation (ICAMS)
description: Stress-strain analysis of single-phase polycrystalline copper with a Goss texture using a cubic representative volume element (RVE) and periodic boundary conditions, performed with Abaqus through the crystal plasticity finite element method.

_creators.name: Shoghi, Ronak
_creators.institute: Interdisciplinary Centre for Advanced Materials Simulation (ICAMS)

_contributors.name: Hartmaier, Alexander
_contributors.institute: Interdisciplinary Centre for Advanced Materials Simulation (ICAMS)
